title: Dynamic Neural Radiance Fields for Monocular 4D Facial Avatar Reconstruction
figure: A driven neural radiance field conditioned on expression coefficients; reenacts a person from monocular video.
abstract: Dynamic neural radiance field conditioned on a low-dimensional morphable-model expression code, learned from a short monocular RGB video. Enables free-viewpoint photoreal re-rendering with explicit control over pose and expression.

title: HeadNeRF: A Real-time NeRF-based Parametric Head Model
figure: A parametric head NeRF with disentangled identity, expression, albedo and illumination latents; real-time rendering.
abstract: A NeRF-based parametric head model with disentangled identity, expression, albedo, and illumination. Couples an implicit field with a 2D neural renderer to reach real-time framerates.

title: I M Avatar: Implicit Morphable Head Avatars from Videos
figure: Implicit morphable head: skinning a canonical signed distance field via expression blendshapes learned from monocular video.
abstract: Learns an implicit morphable head avatar from a single monocular RGB video. A canonical SDF is deformed by learned expression and pose blendshapes, yielding fine geometric detail and generalisation to unseen expressions.

title: Neural Head Avatars from Monocular RGB Videos
figure: Hybrid mesh + neural texture head avatar trained on ~1-2 min of monocular video.
abstract: Hybrid explicit mesh plus neural texture representation optimised from monocular video. Produces an animatable, relightable head avatar with hair and shoulders intact.

title: Reconstructing Personalized Semantic Facial NeRF Models from Monocular Video
figure: Hash-grid NeRF with per-expression blendshape basis; fast training from monocular capture.
abstract: Semantic blendshape basis built directly on top of a multi-level hash-grid NeRF. Fast personalised fitting from a short monocular video and intuitive expression control.

title: RODIN: A Generative Model for Sculpting 3D Digital Avatars Using Diffusion
figure: Roll-out tri-plane diffusion generating full 3D head avatars from text or image prompts.
abstract: Diffusion model operating on a rolled-out tri-plane representation to synthesise detailed 3D head avatars from image or text conditioning. Scales to high-resolution geometry and texture jointly.

title: PanoHead: Geometry-Aware 3D Full-Head Synthesis in 360°
figure: Full 360° head generator using a tri-grid representation; handles back-of-head hair.
abstract: First 3D GAN capable of synthesising heads from any viewpoint, including the back. A novel tri-grid representation and background-aware training pipeline close the 360° gap.

title: Instant Volumetric Head Avatars
figure: Instant neural graphics primitives anchored on a tracked FLAME mesh — 10 minutes to train.
abstract: Dynamic neural radiance field anchored on a tracked FLAME mesh and accelerated by a multi-resolution hash grid. Trains a personalised volumetric head avatar from monocular video in under ten minutes.

title: PointAvatar: Deformable Point-based Head Avatars from Videos
figure: Deformable oriented point cloud head avatar optimised per-subject from monocular video.
abstract: Represents a head as a deformable oriented point cloud, combining the efficiency of points with the topology-flexibility of implicit fields. Produces sharp strand-like hair and cloth detail.

title: AvatarMAV: Fast 3D Head Avatar Reconstruction Using Motion-Aware Neural Voxels
figure: Motion-aware neural voxel grids decoupling canonical appearance and expression-driven motion.
abstract: Decouples head avatar into motion-aware neural voxel grids and a canonical appearance field. Trains in minutes while faithfully capturing dynamic expressions.

title: HAvatar: High-fidelity Head Avatar via Facial Model Conditioned NeRF
figure: Facial-model-conditioned NeRF with a 2D neural super-resolution renderer for high fidelity.
abstract: Conditions a radiance field on a parametric facial model and super-resolves its output with a 2D neural renderer. Delivers high-fidelity reenactment with stable temporal coherence.

title: GaussianHead: Impressive Head Avatars with Learnable Gaussian Derivation
figure: Anisotropic 3D Gaussians derived from a canonical neural field, deformed by expression.
abstract: Drives a set of anisotropic 3D Gaussians by a learned canonical neural field and expression-conditioned deformation. First wave of 3DGS-based head avatars.

title: GaussianAvatars: Photorealistic Head Avatars with Rigged 3D Gaussians
figure: 3D Gaussians rigidly attached to FLAME mesh triangles; drives photoreal avatars.
abstract: Binds 3D Gaussian splats to the triangles of a FLAME mesh so they inherit mesh-driven animation. Produces photoreal, cross-identity reenactable head avatars.

title: Gaussian Head Avatar: Ultra High-fidelity Head Avatar via Dynamic Gaussians
figure: Dynamic 3D Gaussians on top of a learned guiding mesh; multi-view capture.
abstract: Ultra-high-fidelity head avatar representation that combines a dynamic mesh backbone with 3D Gaussian splats. Trained from multi-view captures to 2K photoreal output.

title: SplattingAvatar: Realistic Real-Time Human Avatars with Mesh-Embedded Gaussian Splatting
figure: Barycentric-embedded Gaussians drifting along a skinned mesh; real-time playback.
abstract: Embeds 3D Gaussians barycentrically on a driving mesh and lets them walk on it during optimisation. Produces realistic, real-time animatable full-body and head avatars.

title: FlashAvatar: High-Fidelity Digital Avatar Rendering at 300FPS
figure: Gaussian avatar rendered at 300 FPS from a short monocular video.
abstract: Compact Gaussian representation attached to a mesh surface, trained in minutes from monocular video. Renders a photoreal animatable avatar at 300 FPS.

title: MonoGaussianAvatar: Monocular Gaussian Point-based Head Avatar
figure: Point-based Gaussian head avatar learned purely from monocular video.
abstract: Point-based Gaussian representation optimised from monocular capture, where each point carries learned deformation. Balances quality and per-subject training cost.

title: HQ3DAvatar: High Quality Implicit 3D Head Avatar
figure: High-quality implicit avatar trained from dense multi-view capture.
abstract: Implicit 3D head avatar learned from multi-view capture that prioritises high-frequency detail and viewpoint generalisation.

title: ReliTalk: Relightable Talking Portrait Generation from a Single Video
figure: Relightable talking portrait disentangling albedo, normals, and lighting from a single video.
abstract: Disentangles albedo, surface normals, and environmental lighting from a monocular portrait video to support relightable talking-head rendering.

title: VOODOO 3D: Volumetric Portrait Disentanglement for One-Shot 3D Head Reenactment
figure: One-shot volumetric portrait disentangling appearance from motion for 3D reenactment.
abstract: One-shot 3D head reenactment via a fully volumetric portrait disentanglement network. Generalises to unseen identities without per-subject training.

title: Portrait4D: Learning One-Shot 4D Head Avatar Synthesis Using Synthetic Data
figure: One-shot 4D head avatar synthesised via synthetic-data pretraining plus transformer backbone.
abstract: Learns one-shot 4D (3D + time) head avatar synthesis by pretraining on synthetic portraits and finetuning on real data. Single image in, animatable 3D head out.

title: RGBAvatar: Reduced Gaussian Blendshapes for Online Modeling of Head Avatars
figure: Online head avatar with a compact Gaussian blendshape basis — trains while streaming.
abstract: Compresses Gaussian head avatars into a reduced blendshape basis so that reconstruction can run online while the capture video is still streaming.

title: GiGA: Gaussian Identity-conditioned Generative Avatars
figure: Identity-conditioned generator over Gaussian head avatars — sample new heads directly in 3DGS.
abstract: Generative model over Gaussian-splat head avatars that is conditioned on a compact identity latent. Enables direct sampling and interpolation in 3DGS space.

title: NPGA: Neural Parametric Gaussian Avatars
figure: Neural parametric head model fused with 3D Gaussian splats — animatable and view-consistent.
abstract: Marries a neural parametric head model with 3D Gaussian splatting. Yields animatable, view-consistent head avatars with strong generalisation across identities.

title: Relightable Gaussian Head Avatars
figure: Relightable Gaussian splats with learned BRDF decomposition — renders under novel lighting.
abstract: Gaussian head avatar with per-splat BRDF parameters learned from multi-view lightstage data. Produces relightable, view-consistent head rendering.

title: MetaCap: Meta-learning Priors from Multi-View Imagery For Sparse-view Human Performance Capture
figure: Meta-learned NeRF priors enabling sparse-view human capture — few images are enough.
abstract: Meta-learns NeRF priors from large multi-view datasets so that sparse-view capture at test time reconstructs high-quality humans and heads.

title: SPLATR: Studio-Quality 3D Head Avatars via Tri-plane Gaussian Splatting
figure: Tri-plane conditioned Gaussian splats producing studio-quality head avatars.
abstract: Combines a tri-plane latent representation with 3D Gaussian splatting to deliver studio-quality, animatable head avatars from a calibrated capture rig.

title: DiffHead: Diffusion Priors for Generalizable Head Avatar Reconstruction
figure: Pretrained diffusion prior pulling a sparse-view NeRF toward plausible head geometry.
abstract: Leverages a pretrained face-image diffusion model as a prior for sparse-view head avatar reconstruction. Improves identity fidelity under aggressive view subsampling.

title: UnivAvatar: A Universal Head Avatar Foundation Model
figure: Transformer foundation model jointly trained on 10K identities for one-shot head avatars.
abstract: Foundation model for head avatars pretrained on a 10K-identity multi-view corpus. Solves one-shot reconstruction, reenactment, and relighting in a single stack.

title: HoloAvatar: Light-Field Gaussians for Holographic Head Display
figure: Light-field Gaussians rendered to a holographic display — parallax-correct head avatar.
abstract: Extends Gaussian head avatars to a light-field representation suitable for near-eye holographic displays. Retains parallax and accommodation cues.

title: Editable Gaussian Head Avatars via Semantic Part Control
figure: Semantic part-controlled editing of a Gaussian head avatar — hair, brows, lips.
abstract: Structured semantic part labels attached to each Gaussian, enabling text or slider-based local edits of hair, brows, lips on a personal head avatar.

title: BakedAvatar: Baking Neural Fields for Real-Time Head Avatar Synthesis
figure: Neural fields baked into layered meshes and neural textures — runs on mobile.
abstract: Bakes a dynamic neural head field into layered meshes and neural textures, enabling real-time rendering on commodity mobile hardware.

title: MonoAvatar++: Expressive Head Avatars from Monocular Video
figure: Expression-expressive monocular head avatar — strong tongue & eye control.
abstract: Monocular head avatar with improved tongue, eye, and micro-expression modelling via an enriched expression code and specialised regularisers.

title: TalkingGaussian: Structure-Persistent Talking Head Synthesis via Gaussian Splatting
figure: Structure-persistent talking head: audio-driven Gaussian deformations stay coherent.
abstract: Audio-driven talking head built on 3D Gaussian splats with structure-persistent deformation fields that avoid the jitter common to point-based talking-head pipelines.
